name: REST EZ Inc.
summary: PART I Item 1. Description of Business. The Company was incorporated in the State of Wyoming on October 17, 2016.Rest EZ, Inc. markets a sleeping aid soft gel capsule to be sold to the general public through wholesalers and retailers, as well as online at www.RestEz.net. The Rest EZ Sleep Aid Supplement soft gel capsule is a liquid gel capsule containing soybean oil, Melatonin, gelatin, glycerin, L-glutamic Acid, yellow beeswax, purified water, L-leucine, L-arginine and lecithin.
